artPrompt: A hero shot of a humble folding registration table draped in an ivory cloth, a jar of pens chained to its edge, clipboards stacked with blank illegible forms, golden afternoon light pooling across the surface. The table floats in generous negative space, washes of leafy green grounding its legs. An ordinary civic object made quietly noble, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Voter Registration Table
text:
Voters you control get +1/+0.
{2}{G}{W}, {T}: Create two 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens.
Whenever five or more Voters you control attack, draw a card. (Big turnout, big mailing list.)
flavorText: Cousin to the rival's Voter Turnout Totem, but ours has a tablecloth and a jar of pens chained to the table.
